pub_mfg_pain_subtitle: FabricOS gives plant and COO teams one system to see risk early and act with numbers, not panic.
pub_mfg_pain1_desc: Unplanned downtime burns hourly cost, late customer orders, and overtime.
pub_mfg_pain2_desc: Material arrives late with no leading indicator — lines idle and schedules collapse.
pub_mfg_pain3_desc: Too much of the wrong stock; critical SKUs still stock out.
pub_mfg_pain4_desc: Ops, procurement and finance each have their own truth — decisions slip.
pub_mfg_sol_title: One platform. Every line of defense.
pub_mfg_sol_subtitle: Predictive maintenance, supplier intelligence, smart inventory and an executive cockpit — unified.
pub_mfg_sol1_desc: See which asset will fail next and schedule work before the stop.
pub_mfg_sol2_desc: Lead-time reliability, risk scores and escalation before the line goes red.
pub_mfg_sol3_desc: ABC analysis, reorder suggestions and carrying-cost visibility in one place.
pub_mfg_sol4_desc: KPIs, scenarios and plain-language answers for the daily stand-up and board pack.
pub_mfg_sol5_desc: Monthly sustainability and compliance exports without another spreadsheet project.

pub_feat_subtitle: Premium capabilities for operations, supply chain and leadership.

pub_feat_pm_desc: Health scores, MTBF/MTTR views, maintenance history and risk prediction.
pub_feat_sup_intel_desc: Scorecards, delivery reliability, compliance signals and comparisons.
pub_feat_inv_desc: ABC analysis, dead-stock detection, reorder suggestions and carrying cost.
pub_feat_sim_desc: Model supplier delays, demand spikes and outages — see revenue and stockout risk.
pub_feat_esg_desc: Polished PDF narratives, monthly exports and sustainability scoring.
pub_feat_exec_desc: Leadership-ready summaries — daily CEO view, margin signals, and exportable trends.
pub_feat_ord_desc: Margin per order, late-risk score and timeline tracking across suppliers.
pub_feat_rt_desc: Live telemetry, alerts and team activity in one secure workspace.
pub_testimonial_section_subtitle: Manufacturing SMEs using FabricOS to stabilize output and cash.
pub_testimonial_1_quote: FabricOS replaced four dashboards and a maze of spreadsheets. Our COO finally has one morning ritual.

pub_contact_title: Book a demo or talk to our team
pub_contact_subtitle: Tell us about plants, ERP stack and KPIs — we respond with a realistic 30-day rollout plan.
pub_contact_form_lead: No obligation. We reply within 1–2 business days.
pub_contact_snackbar: Thanks — in production this routes to your CRM.
pub_faq_subtitle: Deployment, data security and how AI fits your stack.
pub_faq_q1: Do we need to replace our ERP?
pub_faq_a1: No. FabricOS sits above ERP/MES with connectors and curated data feeds — start with read-only snapshots.
pub_faq_q2: How fast can we go live?
pub_faq_a2: Most SME deployments reach value in under a week for core dashboards, then deepen modules iteratively.
pub_faq_a3: EU-first infrastructure with encryption in transit and at rest. Enterprise adds SSO and custom retention.
pub_faq_a4: Yes. Rules-based automation works day one; AI copilot and forecasts activate when you choose.
